title: Better than Bread
description: Better than Bread is a mod, which adds pastries to the Farmer's Delight mod
body:
# Archived
Yup, I decided to archive this mod. Sadly, I do not want currently to continue it as my life took a bit of hardships.

# 🥯 Introduction
Hello and welcome to **Better than Bread**! Better than Bread is an expansion for Farmer's Delight mod, adding more pastry to the Minecraft!
## βeta Disclaimer
**This mod is currently in beta, so keep in mind that everything might change, and, there might be some bugs along the way. Though, if you encounter one, we strongly encourage you report it to our [Issue Tracker](https://codeberg.org/Iced-Coded/better-than-bread/issues)**

[![status-badge](https://ci.codeberg.org/api/badges/15419/status.svg)](https://ci.codeberg.org/repos/15419)\
[![codeberg](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/codeberg_vector.svg)](https://codeberg.org/Iced-Coded/better-than-bread)

## 🫙 Butter
We've added butter, and a manual butter churn!
To use it, you pour into a churn 1 bucket of milk, and then mix it with a stick 5 times.
After you've mixed it well, take it out using Shift+RMB, and voila! Here's a fresh stick of butter!
## 🥐 Pastry
Currently, we have Croissants, Pain au Chocolat, Cinnamon and a Porkpie.
